creator: cowens@greatbaysoftware.com
text:
Attempting to build today on an 8.3 system;  after fresh checkout, the 
'make install' wraps up with:

gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd-bdb.5: No such file or directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd-config.5: No such file or 
directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd-dnssrv.5: No such file or 
directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd-ldap.5: No such file or 
directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd-ldbm.5: No such file or 
directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd-ldif.5: No such file or 
directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd-mdb.5: No such file or directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd-meta.5: No such file or 
directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd-monitor.5: No such file or 
directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd-ndb.5: No such file or directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd-null.5: No such file or 
directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd-passwd.5: No such file or 
directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd-perl.5: No such file or 
directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd-relay.5: No such file or 
directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd-shell.5: No such file or 
directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd-sock.5: No such file or 
directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd-sql.5: No such file or directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd.access.5: No such file or 
directory
gzip: can't stat: /usr/local/man/man5/slapd.backends.5: No such file or 
directory
....

Looks like this is for every slap* manpage.  Given the recent patch this 
finding seems likely to be related.

Thanks,

Charles
